ocr_findings.description: Section header icons: image shows a circular pink share-style icon before 'プロジェクトスケジュールマネジメントで使う2つの図' and before '(1) ガントチャート'. OCR substitutes these icons with '❌' (cross mark emoji). This is a cosmetic icon substitution that does not change text meaning.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 07-03 content page on プロジェクトスケジュールマネジメント. Contains illustrative image (correctly placeholder), caption '時は金なり', body text about PMBOK, and introduction to ガントチャート and アローダイアグラム. All substantive text is faithfully captured. The only finding is decorative icon substitution with ❌, which is cosmetic.
